creator: jb.1234abcd@gmail.com
text:
Boot loader location selection.

I installed FreeBSD 9.1-RC2 and noticed that there was no question asked
where to install boot loader (MBR or FreeBSD root slice/partition).
We want to have that for multi-boot systems.

It should be added to Committing to the Installation step.

How-To-Repeat: bsdinstall
